title: 10 best herbal creams for sleep deprivation
description: St John's Wort creams helps with sleep deprivation because it contains hyperforin, a compound that has been shown to increase serotonin levels in the brain. Serotonin is a neurotransmitter that regulates mood and relaxation, which are both essential for falling asleep and staying asleep. By boosting serotonin production, St John's Wort creams can help to calm the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety that often accompany sleep deprivation.
